category_sources: source_facts.description says it counts source lines of code; official GitHub README describes source-code statistics and supported output formats.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is sloc; official GitHub repository title and README use sloc.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface, with install, CLI usage, Node.js usage, and supported languages.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository and source_facts.repo is empty.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies source line counting; official GitHub README documents CLI usage, Node.js usage, output formats, and code metrics.
